prompt: Create a vertical cinematic close-up portrait of a graceful female immortal cultivator in a Chinese xianxia fantasy drama style. She is framed from the chest up in a dim antique interior beside a softly glowing lattice window, with hazy volumetric sunlight streaming from the upper left and a dark blurred background. The subject has long glossy black hair styled half-up with loose flowing strands over the shoulders, an ornate gold hairpin visible near the back of the head, and delicate period-drama styling. Her face is deliberately covered by one large opaque muted gray-brown rectangular censor block centered over the entire face, while the hair, neck, clothing, and hands remain visible. She wears layered flowing Hanfu robes in pale ivory, silver-gray, and light blue, with embroidered brocade trim, a warm red inner collar, soft translucent fabric, and subtle metallic thread details. Both hands hold a vivid translucent emerald-green sword or jade blade horizontally across the lower foreground, angled slightly upward from left to right, with gold fittings at the right edge; the blade catches a bright specular highlight. Use realistic high-budget Chinese fantasy TV production lighting, shallow depth of field, soft bloom, film grain, natural skin and fabric texture, dramatic backlight, and a mystical but grounded mood. Vertical 9:16 composition, close crop, no visible text, no watermark, no extra characters.
